title: ContextFileContent
description: A stored content snapshot for a ContextFile.

id.description: Unique identifier of the content snapshot.

displayName.description: Display name of the content snapshot.

fullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the content snapshot.

contextFile.description: The file this content snapshot belongs to.

assetId.description: Reference to the Asset entity storing the actual file blob.

contentType.description: MIME type of the stored content.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the stored content.

sourceVersion.description: Provider revision or version token for synced files.

ingestedAt.description: Time the content snapshot was ingested.

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current content snapshot for the file.

processingStatus.description: Processing status for this content snapshot.

processingError.description: Processing failure details for this snapshot.

extractedText.description: Canonical extracted text for this content snapshot.

updatedAt.description: Last update time in Unix epoch time milliseconds.

changeDescription.description: Change that led to this version.

incrementalChangeDescription.description: Incremental change that led to this version.

deleted.description: When true indicates the entity has been soft deleted.
